name: Rolling Release
description: Updates pushed continuously as soon as available

name: Long Term Support
description: Stable version supported for several years

name: Wayland Protocol
description: Modern protocol with features like HDR and VRR in mind

name: X11 Protocol
description: Legacy protocol that lacks support for modern features

name: Irregular
description: Major updates every few years

name: 24 Months
description: Major updates every 24 months

name: 12 Months
description: Major updates every 12 months

name: 6 Months
description: Major updates every 6 months

name: Floating Windows
description: Windows float freely and overlap

name: Tiling Windows
description: Windows snap to a grid without gaps

name: WIP
description: Distro is not ready for production yet

name: Scrolling Windows
description: Windows placed on a scrollable strip

name: Immutable
description: Core system is read-only to prevent breakage

name: Source Based
description: Software compiled locally to optimize for hardware

name: Declarative
description: Entire system defined by a single configuration file

name: Community Maintained
description: Maintained by volunteers without corporate ownership

name: Corporate Maintained
description: Maintained by a commercial company

name: FOSS Focus
description: Prioritizes open-source and doesn't include proprietary drivers

name: Lightweight
description: Optimized for low resource usage

name: Unconventional Workflow
description: Workflow differs from tranditional desktops (like Windows)
